ksa_text: Skill in writing production-quality data transformation code in SQL and at least one general-purpose programming language (Python or Scala), including unit testing and documentation.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: skill maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("sql", "unit test"). STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.3979); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation present: 2 match(es) in DE job postings or certification scope. Skill appears in DE role descriptions — sufficient to uphold.
